sqlMap.select: SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent , folder.folder_name1 as text,folder.create_id as createId from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.company_id = #comId# and (user.USER_ID IN ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) or user.USER_ID = #userId# or user.USER_ID = #comId#) ) and folder.use_status = 'Y' and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# or (folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' and folder.folder_type = #folderType# AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId# and folder.use_status = 'Y' AND ( folder.OWNER_ID = #comId# or folder.OWNER_ID IN ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) )) order by folder.create_date
SELECT FOLDER_UPPER FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_ID = #folderId# and TENANT_ID = #tenantId#

SELECT DISTINCT type.TYPE_ICON , t.FOLDER_PATH as folder_path, t.FOLDER_NAME1 as FOLDER_NAME1, file.FILE_ID , file.FILE_NAME , file.FILE_PATH , file.FILE_SIZE , file.TYPE_ID , file.DOWN_COUNT , file.FILE_EXT , file.FOLDER_ID , file.USE_STATUS , file.CREATE_ID , file.CREATE_NAME1 , file.CREATE_NAME2 , file.CREATE_DATE as CREATE_DATE, file.UPDATE_ID , file.UPDATE_DATE , file.TENANT_ID , if (EXISTS ( select * from tbl_webfolder_favor fav where fav.USER_ID = #userId# and fav.tenant_id = #tenantId# and file.file_id = fav.target_id and fav.target_type = 'F'),'1','0')as FAVORITE_STATUS, if (EXISTS ( select * from tbl_webfolder_share sh where sh.USER_ID = #userId# and sh.tenant_id = #tenantId# and file.file_id = sh.FOLDERFILE_ID and sh.folderfile_type = 'F'),'1','0')as FILESHARE_STATUS
from tbl_webfolder_file file inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_id = #folderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# group by folder_path) as t on t.folder_id = file.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type ON type.TYPE_ID = file.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = file.tenant_id where file.tenant_id = #tenantId# and file.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
FROM tbl_webfolder_file as file inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like ( select concat(FOLDER_PATH,'%') from tbl_webfolder_folder where FOLDER_ID = #folderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# group by folder_path ) and tenant_id = #tenantId#) as t on file.folder_id = t.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type ON type.TYPE_ID = file.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = file.tenant_id where file.tenant_id = #tenantId# and file.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
file.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchExt#, '%')
file.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#, '%')
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')
file.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#, '%')
group by file.file_id union all select DISTINCT type.TYPE_ICON AS TYPE_ICON , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FOLDER_PATH , folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FOLDER_NAME1 , folder.FOLDER_ID AS FILE_ID , folder.FOLDER_NAME1 AS FILE_NAME , folder.FOLDER_PATH AS FILE_PATH , 0 AS FILE_SIZE , "folder" AS TYPE_ID , 0 AS DOWN_COUNT , "folder" AS FILE_EXT , folder.FOLDER_ID AS FOLDER_ID , folder.USE_STATUS AS USE_STATUS , folder.CREATE_ID AS CREATE_ID , folder.CREATE_NAME1 AS CREATE_NAME1 , folder.CREATE_NAME2 AS CREATE_NAME2 , folder.CREATE_DATE AS CREATE_DATE , folder.UPDATE_ID AS UPDATE_ID , folder.UPDATE_DATE AS UPDTAE_DATE , folder.TENANT_ID as TENANT_ID , if (EXISTS ( select * from tbl_webfolder_favor fav where fav.USER_ID = #userId# and fav.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.folder_id = fav.target_id and fav.target_type = 'D'),'1','0')as FAVORITE_STATUS,
if (EXISTS ( select * from tbl_webfolder_share sh where sh.USER_ID = #userId# and sh.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.folder_id = sh.FOLDERFILE_ID and sh.folderfile_type = 'D'),'1','0')as FILESHARE_STATUS from tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder as folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = "folder" where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.folder_upper = #folderId# and folder.company_id = #comId# ORDER BY CREATE_DATE desc
LIMIT #pStart#, #pEnd#

SELECT distinct count(*) from tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type LEFT OUTER JOIN tbl_webfolder_folder as folder ON type.TYPE_NAME = "folder" where folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and folder.USE_STATUS = 'Y' and folder.folder_upper = #folderId# and folder.company_id = #comId# and type.tenant_id = #tenantId# ORDER BY CREATE_DATE desc

SELECT distinct count(*)
from tbl_webfolder_file file inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_id = #folderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# group by folder_path) as t on t.folder_id = file.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type ON type.TYPE_ID = file.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = file.tenant_id where file.tenant_id = #tenantId# and file.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
FROM tbl_webfolder_file as file inner join ( select * from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like ( select concat(FOLDER_PATH,'%') from tbl_webfolder_folder where FOLDER_ID = #folderId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# group by folder_path ) and tenant_id = #tenantId#) as t on file.folder_id = t.folder_id inner join tbl_webfolder_filetype AS type ON type.TYPE_ID = file.TYPE_ID and type.tenant_id = file.tenant_id where file.tenant_id = #tenantId# and file.USE_STATUS = 'Y'
file.FILE_EXT LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchExt#, '%')
file.CREATE_NAME1 LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchCreateName#, '%')
type.TYPE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileType#, '%')
file.FILE_NAME LIKE CONCAT('%', #searchFileName#, '%')

SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text,folder.create_id as createId from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where SUBSTRING_INDEX(SUBSTRING_INDEX(folder.FOLDER_PATH, '|' ,3), '|', -1) in( select distinct folder.folder_id FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.folder_id = user.folder_id where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and user.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId# and (user.USER_ID IN (select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) or user.USER_ID = #userId# or user.USER_ID = #comId#) ) and folder.tenant_id = #tenantId# or (folder.FOLDER_UPPER = 'root' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id =#comId# and folder.use_status = 'Y' and folder.OWNER_ID = #comId#) or (folder.use_status = 'Y' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and (folder.OWNER_ID = #userId# or folder.OWNER_ID = #deptId# or folder.OWNER_ID = #comId# or folder.OWNER_ID IN ( select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or dept.cn = #deptId#) )) order by folder.FOLDER_TYPE, folder.CREATE_DATE

SELECT distinct folder_id as id ,if( folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder_upper )as parent, folder_name1 as text from tbl_webfolder_folder where TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and FOLDER_TYPE = #folderType# and USE_STATUS = 'Y' order by create_date

select distinct folder.FOLDER_ID as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.FOLDER_UPPER )as parent, folder.FOLDER_NAME1 as text,folder.create_id as createId from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder left outer join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on folder.FOLDER_ID = user.FOLDER_ID where folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.use_status = 'Y' AND folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.COMPANY_ID = #comId# and folder.OWNER_ID = #userId# order by folder.create_date

SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text, folder.owner_id as owner, folder.FOLDER_PATH from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.company_id = #comId# and folder.owner_id in (select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or folder.owner_id = #deptId#) and folder.use_status = 'Y' UNION SELECT folder_id as id ,if( folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder_upper ) as parent, folder_name1 as text, owner_id as owner, FOLDER_PATH FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE OWNER_ID in ( SELECT d2.cn FROM TBL_DEPTMASTER d2 JOIN ( SELECT f.* FROM ( tbl_webfolder_folder f JOIN tbl_webfolder_folderuser u ON f.FOLDER_ID = u.FOLDER_ID AND u.USER_ID = #userId# AND u.USER_TYPE = 'chief' AND f.TENANT_ID = u.TENANT_ID ) ) AS a ON d2.CN = a.OWNER_ID AND d2.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID WHERE d2.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# )
SELECT * FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and COMPANY_ID = #comId# and FOLDER_ID = #folderUppId#

SELECT cn, password, displayname, displayname2, department, description, description2, title, title2, physicaldeliveryofficename as companyid, company, company2, updatedt, extensionattribute1 as rollinfo, telephonenumber, mail, extensionattribute10 as jikchek, tenant_id FROM TBL_USERMASTER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and PHYSICALDELIVERYOFFICENAME = #comId# and CN = #userId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT if (folder_id is null,1, MAX(CONVERT(FOLDER_ID ,UNSIGNED))+1) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES( #id#, #folderName1#, #folderName2#, #folderType#, concat(#folderPath#,#id#,'|'), #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUppId#, 'Y', #ownerId#, #userId#, SYSDATE(), #createName1#, #createName2#, #userId#, SYSDATE(), #comId#, #tenantId# )

SELECT if (folder_id = null,1,MAX(CONVERT(FOLDER_ID ,UNSIGNED))+1 ) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDERUSER ( SEQ_ID, USER_ID, USER_TYPE, FOLDER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) VALUES ( #id#, #userId#, #userType#, #folderId#, #createId#, #createDate#, #comId#, #tenantId# )
sqlMap.select: SELECT if(MAX(FOLDER_STEP) is not null, +1,0) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE FOLDER_UPPER = #folderUppId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#

SELECT distinct folder.folder_id as id ,if( folder.folder_upper = 'root', '##', folder.folder_upper ) as parent, folder.folder_name1 as text, folder.owner_id as owner, folder.FOLDER_PATH from TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER folder where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.folder_type = #folderType# and folder.company_id = #comId# and folder.owner_id in (select dept.cn from tbl_deptmaster dept left outer join tbl_addjobmaster addj on(dept.cn = addj.deptid) where addj.cn = #userId# or folder.owner_id = #deptId#) and folder.use_status = 'Y' union select f.folder_id as id ,if( f.folder_upper = 'root', '##', f.folder_upper ) as parent, f.folder_name1 as text, f.owner_id as owner, f.FOLDER_PATH
from
( tbl_deptmaster as dept inner join tbl_webfolder_folder f on dept.cn = f.owner_id inner join tbl_webfolder_folderuser user on f.folder_id = user.FOLDER_ID and f.tenant_id = user.tenant_id )
where user.user_id = #userId# and f.tenant_id = #tenantId# and user.USER_TYPE = 'chief' group by f.folder_id
select DEPTID as cn from tbl_addjobmaster where cn = #userId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select cn from tbl_addjobmaster where DEPTID = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId#
select cn , EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 from tbl_deptmaster where DEPT_CD_PATH like concat('%',#deptId#,'%')

SELECT count(owner_id) FROM tbl_webfolder_folder WHERE tenant_id =#tenantId# and company_id = #comId# and folder_type = #folderType# and folder_upper='root'
owner_id = #comId#
owner_id = #deptId#
owner_id = #userId#
select cn , displayname, displayname2 ,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE9 ,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE1 ,EXTENSIONATTRIBUTE2 from tbl_deptmaster WHERE tenant_id =#tenantId# and cn =#deptId#

SELECT f.folder_id as id , if( f.folder_upper = 'root', '##', f.folder_upper ) as parent, f.folder_name1 as text, f.owner_id as owner
FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER f JOIN ( select d1.*
from tbl_deptmaster d1 left outer join tbl_addjobmaster a on(d1.cn = a.deptid AND d1.TENANT_ID = a.TENANT_ID ) where (a.CN = #userId# OR d1.CN = #deptId#) AND d1.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: UPDATE TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER SET UPDATE_DATE = SYSDATE(), FOLDER_NAME1 = #newFolderName1#, FOLDER_NAME2 = #newFolderName2# WHERE folder_id = #folderId# and COMPANY_ID = #comId# AND TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.select: select count(DISTINCT if (create_id =#userId#,'1','0')) as checked from tbl_webfolder_folder where folder_path like ( select concat(folder.folder_path,'%') from tbl_webfolder_folder folder where folder.folder_id like concat('%',#folderId#,'%') and folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId# ) and tenant_id = #tenantId#

select count(DISTINCT if (file.create_id =#userId#,'1','0')) as checked from tbl_webfolder_file file inner join ( select folder.folder_id from tbl_webfolder_folder folder where folder.folder_path like concat('%|',#folderId#,'|%') and folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId#) as a on file.folder_id = a.folder_id where tenant_id = #tenantId#
sqlMap.update: update tbl_webfolder_folder as folder set folder.use_status = 'T' , folder.DELETER_ID = #userId# where folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.FOLDER_PATH like ( select path from ( select concat(df.folder_path ,'%') as path from tbl_webfolder_folder df where df.folder_id = #folderId# and df.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and df.company_id = #comId#) a)

update tbl_webfolder_file as file set file.use_status = 'T', file.DELETER_ID = #userId# where file.FOLDER_ID in ( select id from ( select concat(folder.folder_path ,'%') as path, folder.FOLDER_ID id from tbl_webfolder_folder folder where folder.folder_path like concat('%|',#folderId#,'|%') and folder.TENANT_ID = #tenantId# and folder.company_id = #comId#) a) and file.TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
sqlMap.insert:
SELECT if (folder_id is null,1, MAX(CONVERT(FOLDER_ID ,UNSIGNED))+1) FROM TBL_WEBFOLDER_FOLDER WHERE TENANT_ID = #tenantId#
INSERT INTO tbl_webfolder_folder ( FOLDER_ID, FOLDER_NAME1, FOLDER_NAME2, FOLDER_TYPE, FOLDER_PATH, FOLDER_STEP, FOLDER_LEVEL, FOLDER_UPPER, USE_STATUS, OWNER_ID, CREATE_ID, CREATE_DATE, CREATE_NAME1, CREATE_NAME2, UPDATE_ID, UPDATE_DATE, COMPANY_ID, TENANT_ID ) SELECT #id#, #folderName1#, #folderName2#, #folderType#, concat(#folderPath#,#id#,'|'), #folderStep#, #folderLevel#, #folderUppId#, 'Y', #deptId#, #userId#, SYSDATE(), #createName1#, #createName2#, #userId#, SYSDATE(), #comId#, #tenantId# FROM tbl_webfolder_folder WHERE NOT EXISTS ( SELECT owner_id FROM tbl_webfolder_folder WHERE owner_id = #deptId# and tenant_id = #tenantId# and folder_type = 'D' ) LIMIT 1 ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tenant_id = #tenantId#
